name: agent-desktop
description: Agent Desktop - 可切換 Claude Code／Codex CLI 的多引擎 Agent 協作平台

scripts.backend:compile:win: cd backend && python -m PyInstaller --onefile --name claude-backend --hidden-import aiohttp --hidden-import aiohttp_cors --hidden-import aiohttp.web_protocol --hidden-import aiohttp.web_middlewares --hidden-import aiohttp.web_urldispatcher --hidden-import multipart --hidden-import sqlite3 --hidden-import croniter --collect-all aiohttp --collect-all aiohttp_cors main.py && copy dist\claude-backend.exe claude-backend.exe
scripts.backend:compile:mac: cd backend && pyinstaller --onefile --name claude-backend --hidden-import aiohttp --hidden-import aiohttp_cors --hidden-import aiohttp.web_protocol --hidden-import aiohttp.web_middlewares --hidden-import aiohttp.web_urldispatcher --hidden-import multipart --hidden-import sqlite3 --hidden-import croniter --collect-all aiohttp --collect-all aiohttp_cors main.py && cp dist/claude-backend claude-backend
scripts.backend:compile:linux: cd backend && pyinstaller --onefile --name claude-backend --hidden-import aiohttp --hidden-import aiohttp_cors --hidden-import aiohttp.web_protocol --hidden-import aiohttp.web_middlewares --hidden-import aiohttp.web_urldispatcher --hidden-import multipart --hidden-import sqlite3 --hidden-import croniter --collect-all aiohttp --collect-all aiohttp_cors main.py && cp dist/claude-backend claude-backend
scripts.dist:win: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:compile:win   && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:compile:mac   && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:compile:linux && electron-builder --linux
